holdings.infoBox: VEXC is an equity ETF with a total of 1059 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 21.61%, MediaTek at 2.51%, Delta Electronics at 1.86%, Hon Hai Precision Industry at 1.40%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 1.24%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Emerging Markets Ex-China ETF (VEXC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Emerging ex China index. The fund is a market cap-weighted index that invests in large- and mid-cap stocks from emerging markets, excluding China. VEXC was launched on Sep 16, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: The Ex-China Files: ETFs to Watch Amid Trump's High-Stakes Visit
data.text: Investing in emerging markets (EM) used to be synonymous with getting exposure to China. It's an ideal notion, given that it's the second largest economy and thus commands a heavy weight in standard E...

data.title: Vanguard fund strips out China in emerging markets investment play
data.text: Vanguard launches an exchange-traded fund to help investors access emerging markets like Brazil, India and Taiwan while avoiding China's risk and volatility.

data.title: Vanguard Launches Emerging Markets ex-China ETF
data.text: VALLEY FORGE, Pa. , Oct. 2, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Vanguard today launched Vanguard Emerging Markets ex-China ETF (VEXC).
